ugc.title: Create UGC Content

productImage.title: Product Image
productImage.subtitle: Upload an image of your product for analysis
productImage.tooltip: Upload a clear, high-quality image of your product. The AI will analyze it to understand what you're selling and suggest relevant scenarios.
productImage.supportedFormats: PNG, JPG up to 10MB • Click or drag & drop

productNiche.title: Product Niche & Details
productNiche.subtitle: Detail the product and audience, or use case
productNiche.placeholder: Example: Fitness enthusiasts, outdoor adventurers, busy professionals...
productNiche.tooltip: Describe who your product is for or how it's used. This helps the AI generate relevant scenarios that match your target audience.

scenarios.title: UGC Scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: AI-generated content ideas for your product
scenarios.tooltip: Choose from AI-generated scenarios that show your product in realistic, engaging situations.

generationSettings.title: Image Settings
generationSettings.subtitle: Customize your image output preferences
generationSettings.tooltip: Adjust these settings to control the style, quality, and format of your generated images.

numImages.title: Number of Images
numImages.tooltip: Choose how many variations you want to generate. More images = more options but higher credit cost.

imageQuality.title: Image Quality
imageQuality.tooltip: Higher quality images look better but cost more credits. Low=1 credit, Medium=2 credits, High=3 credits per image.

orientation.title: Image Orientation
orientation.tooltip: Choose the aspect ratio for your images based on where you plan to use them.

qualitySettings.title: Quality
qualitySettings.tooltip: Higher quality uses more credits but produces better results

ugc.freePlanLimited: Free plan limited to 1 image per generation.
ugc.premiumScenariosAvailable: 2 premium scenarios available with paid plans.

timeOfDay.title: Time of Day
timeOfDay.tooltip: Controls the lighting mood in your generated images.

highlight.title: Focus on Product
highlight.tooltip: Choose whether to make your product the main focus or blend it naturally into the scene.

style.title: Visual Style
style.tooltip: Sets the overall aesthetic and mood of the generated images.
